brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: Show me every record NOT from this Hemiunu. My remaining scribes are trusted. I want their names on a papyrus for the vizier.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, year FROM granary WHERE overseer != 'Hemiunu'

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Hemiunu's entry must be excluded. All 60 rows is too many.'
Pharaoh: 'Too few. You are excluding too much — only Hemiunu goes.'
Pharaoh: 'Text values in quotes. Hemiunu is a name, not a column.'
Pharaoh: 'NOT EQUAL. Filter out only Hemiunu.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: 59 trusted entries. The vizier will speak to Hemiunu himself. Your work has been... illuminating. Go.
